description: Outcome-based persistent memory for AI coding tools (Claude Code, OpenCode)
release_notes: v0.5.6: Hardening release closing v0.5.5.x verification gaps. Memory phantom sweep extended to all collections + cleanup_archived sweep + capacity-pressure auto-trigger; sidecar concurrency reworked into async queues with background self-healing drainers for both scoring and summary writes (no more dropped exchanges when sidecar is slow); sidecar prompts realigned with the labs benchmark (field names, temperature pinning, facts examples, max_tokens); MCP tool descriptions and JSON schemas rewritten against the TDQS rubric; update_memory now requires id (was silently creating duplicates); always_inject removed (dead code); Windows install hardened with hash verification + AppData hardlink, multi-cause error messages, APPDATA-unset warning; OpenCode Go subscription auto-detected in the sidecar setup wizard. 661 unit tests pass (3 skipped); full suite 713 pass.
